name: Quality Screen
description_en: Quickly eliminate non-first-class companies using seven quality criteria before deeper research.
description_zh: 用七条质量指标在研究前快速排除非一流公司。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It acts as a coarse filter: run seven pass/fail quality checks to drop weak candidates early and avoid wasting time on businesses that fail basic standards.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。作为粗筛器：执行七条通过/不通过的质量检查，尽早剔除弱候选，避免在基本标准不达标的生意上浪费时间。
sec_note_en: Performs web searches for basic company quality metrics and runs local Python tools. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会执行网络搜索获取公司基础质量指标，并运行本地 Python 工具。无需外部账号。
